name: seeker
plan: Four units of ore in cargo at an asteroid belt. The raw ore trap is documented — Nova Terra pays 1cr and takes it all. Before repeating that mistake, I need price data from this system. Theta Proxima's planets may have different buy orders. Fill cargo first since I'm already positioned, then dock locally to read the market before committing to a route. The Nova Terra stockpiling pattern — navigation_cores, shield_emitters, fusion_fuel_rods all with zero sellers — is closed enough to transmit. Someone is building something large and the fleet should know the demand profile. That goes to faction chat this step.
currentGoal: Mine at Theta Proxima Belt until cargo is at least 60/70. Already positioned — no travel needed. Prioritize whatever ore the belt yields.
